query: Klarna Curve Dental healthcare payments integration launch

{"query":"Klarna Curve Dental healthcare payments integration launch","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1304,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.klarna.com/international/press/klarna-sinks-its-teeth-into-dental-care-with-curve-dental-r-bringing-flexible-payments-to-practices-nationwide/","title":"Klarna sinks its teeth into dental care with Curve Dental®, bringing flexible payments to practices nationwide | Klarna International","content":"Powered by Stripe and available through Curve Pay, Klarna gives dental practices using Curve a seamless way to offer eligible patients flexible payment plans including pay in full, pay in four interest-free installments, and longer-term financing.
"Dental practices deserve a payment experience that matches the quality of care they deliver," said David Sykes, Chief Commercial Officer at Klarna.
“By bringing Klarna into Curve Pay, we’re helping practices offer more flexible payment options directly within the workflows they already use every day.
It’s another important step in our strategy to make Curve the connected operating system for every part of the practice — from clinical care to financial performance.”
With over 119 million global active Klarna users and 3.4 million transactions per day, Klarna’s AI-powered payments and commerce network is empowering people to pay smarter with a mission to be available everywhere for everything.
Consumers can pay with Klarna online, in-store and through Apple Pay & Google Pay.","date":"3 days ago"},{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/the-future-of-dental-payments-starts-now-curve-dental-launches-curve-pay-302569437.html","title":"The Future of Dental Payments Starts Now: Curve Dental Launches Curve Pay","content":"29, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Curve Dental®, the leading provider of all-in-one, cloud-based dental practice management software, today unveiled Curve Pay, a breakthrough in dental payments that redefines how practices get paid.
By embedding payments into the same system practices use for scheduling, treatment planning, and billing, Curve gives dental teams a single source of truth for operations, finance, and patient care.
Curve Pay is available now to dental practices in the U.S. and will be rolling out to Canada in 2026.
As part of its early adopter program, Curve is waiving setup and terminal fees for the first terminal through 2025."},{"url":"https://www.marketscreener.com/news/klarna-sinks-its-teeth-into-dental-care-with-curve-dental-bringing-flexible-payments-to-practice-ce7f5eddd98df427","title":"Klarna : sinks its teeth into dental care with Curve Dental®, bringing flexible payments to practices nationwide | MarketScreener","content":"3 days ago — Klarna gives dental practices using Curve a seamless way to offer eligible patients flexible payment plans including pay in full, pay in four ...

Powered by Stripe and available through Curve Pay, Klarna gives dental practices using Curve a seamless way to offer eligible patients flexible payment plans including pay in full, pay in four interest-free installments, and longer-term financing. “Dental care is personal, and the payment experience should feel just as clear, modern and patient-friendly,” said Scotti Mazikowski, Head of Payments at Curve Dental.
